project.name: SeaBearKit — Swift Package providing SwiftUI layout patterns, centered on persistent-background navigation.
project.stack: Swift 6.0, SwiftUI, SwiftPM. Platforms: iOS 17+ (optimal on iOS 18+), macOS 14+. Strict concurrency.

arch.core_pattern: ZStack with two layers: (1) PersistentBackground lives outside NavigationStack lifecycle, (2) NavigationStack made transparent via `.containerBackground(for: .navigation) { Color.clear }` (iOS 18+). Background never recreates across transitions.
arch.generic_background: PersistentBackgroundNavigation<Background: View, Content: View> accepts any SwiftUI view as background (v1.2.0+). Palette-based init is a constrained extension where Background == PersistentBackground — preserves old API as convenience without breaking changes.
arch.ios17_fallback: iOS 17 lacks `.containerBackground(for: .navigation)`. Fallback chain: `.toolbarBackground(.hidden, for: .navigationBar)` + `.toolbarBackground(.hidden, for: .bottomBar)` + `.scrollContentBackground(.hidden)`. Works in ~90% of cases; custom toolbar backgrounds may conflict and complex transitions may flicker.
arch.two_navigation_apis: Two ways to navigate while preserving background: (1) PersistentNavigationLink — automatic, applies clearing to destinations, recommended; (2) standard NavigationLink + manual `.clearNavigationBackground()` on every destination. Mix-and-match supported.
arch.color_palette: ColorPalette stores `colors: [Color]` plus `gradientIndices: [Int]` and `gradientOpacities: [Double]` — gradients reference palette colors by index rather than duplicating them. Sendable/Hashable/Identifiable for SwiftUI + Swift 6 concurrency.
arch.static_gradients: Backgrounds use static LinearGradient + RadialGradient vignette — no animations. Deliberate: <1% battery/CPU, instant render. Don't add animated gradients without weighing battery cost.

context.failed_approaches: Approaches tried and rejected before the ZStack pattern: (1) LinearGradient overlays — broke navigation rendering; (2) direct background modifiers — inconsistent during palette changes; (3) multi-layer gradients — perf and visibility issues. Don't relitigate without reading ARCHITECTURE.md.
context.manual_modifier_gotcha: With the manual approach, every destination view (including deeply nested ones) MUST call `.clearNavigationBackground()`. Forgetting it on any one screen makes the background disappear on that screen. PersistentNavigationLink avoids this trap.
context.list_form_ios17: On iOS 17, List/Form often render opaque even with the fallback applied — explicitly add `.scrollContentBackground(.hidden)` to the List/Form itself, not just the destination view.
context.swift6_concurrency: Package builds under Swift 6 strict concurrency. All public types must be Sendable where applicable; view types are @MainActor. New types crossing actor boundaries (e.g., palettes) need Sendable conformance.

files.tests: Tests/SeaBearKitTests/ — unit tests for color utils, palette validation, component init.
files.navigation_main: Sources/SeaBearKit/Navigation/PersistentBackgroundNavigation.swift — generic ZStack wrapper; the centerpiece of the library.
files.backgrounds: Sources/SeaBearKit/Backgrounds/ — ColorPalette.swift (palette+indices), GradientBackground.swift (static gradient+vignette), PersistentBackground.swift (configurable, .standard/.minimal presets).
files.modifiers: Sources/SeaBearKit/Modifiers/ — view modifiers package added in v1.3.0 (see CHANGELOG).

conventions.persistence: .codexcli.json = project knowledge (any agent). CLAUDE.md = Claude behavioral directives. MEMORY.md = personal user preferences. Rule: if another agent would benefit, it belongs in .codexcli.json.
conventions.docs_in_repo: Project carries unusually many top-level .md files (README, USAGE, QUICKSTART, ARCHITECTURE, IMPORTANT, LIQUID_GLASS, DEMO, CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG). Update the relevant ones when changing public API — they're treated as first-class docs, not stale notes.
